# Student Deck Spec

```yaml
student_deck_spec_id: cafe-deck-001
lesson_scope_lock_ref: 00_conversation/lesson_scope_lock.md
source_blueprint: 03_lesson_blueprint.md
deck_mode: student_deck
slide_count_target: 10
slides: [{slide_id: 1, student_title: 오늘의 미션, purpose: 주문과 응답 목표, content_blocks: [], interaction: say}]
design_notes: {pacing: [short prompts], visual_rhythm: [one action per slide], accessibility: [large type]}
non_student_notes: []
```
